languages.text:
"Лария". {n}Взгляд Себериана смягчается.{/n} "Моя сенешаль. Моя дочь.
Долгие годы я не знал о ее существовании. Она могла бы стать лишь ошибкой от случайной связи с безымянной служанкой, но стала самым верным моим союзником. С малых лет Лария упорно прокладывала себе путь к мостику своей безупречной службой".

"Laria." {n}Seberian's gaze softens.{/n} "My Seneschal. My daughter. For years, I did not know of her existence. She could have been merely the mistake of a chance dalliance with a nameless servant, but instead she became my most loyal ally. From an early age, Laria forged her path to the bridge through faultless service."
languages.original_text:

Долгие годы я не знал о ее существовании. Она могла бы стать лишь ошибкой от случайной связи с безымянной служанкой, но стала самым верным моим союзником. С малых лет Лария упорно прокладывала себе путь к мостику своей безупречной службой".

"Laria." {n}Seberian's gaze softens.{/n} "My seneschal. My daughter. For years, I did not know of her existence. She could have been merely the mistake of a chance dalliance with a nameless servant, but instead she became my most loyal ally. languages.text: "Laria." {n}Seberians Miene entspannt sich.{/n} "Meine Truchsessin. Meine Tochter. Ich wusste jahrelang nichts von ihrer Existenz. Sie hätte der Fehler einer zufälligen Tändelei mit einer namenlosen Dienerin sein können, wurde aber meine treuesten Verbündete. Schon in jungen Jahren folgte Laria mit makellosem Dienst ihrem Weg auf die Brücke."
languages.original_text: "Laria." {n}Seberian's gaze softens.{/n} "My Seneschal. My daughter. For years, I did not know of her existence. She could have been merely the mistake of a chance dalliance with a nameless servant, but instead she became my most loyal ally. From an early age, Laria forged her path to the bridge through faultless service."

traits.locale_text: "Laria." {n}Seberians Miene entspannt sich.{/n} "Meine Truchsessin. Meine Tochter. Ich wusste jahrelang nichts von ihrer Existenz. Sie hätte der Fehler einer zufälligen Tändelei mit einer namenlosen Dienerin sein können, wurde aber meine treuesten Verbündete. Schon in jungen Jahren folgte Laria mit makellosem Dienst ihrem Weg auf die Brücke."

languages.text: « Laria. {n}Le regard de Seberian se fait plus doux.{/n} Ma sénéchale. Ma fille. Des années durant, j'ai ignoré son existence. Elle aurait pu rester une simple erreur, née d'une rencontre fortuite avec une domestique anonyme, mais non, elle est devenue mon alliée la plus fidèle. Dès son plus jeune âge, Laria a forgé sa propre voie sur la passerelle, travaillant sans relâche et de façon irréprochable. »
languages.original_text: "Laria." {n}Seberian's gaze softens.{/n} "My Seneschal. My daughter. For years, I did not know of her existence. She could have been merely the mistake of a chance dalliance with a nameless servant, but instead she became my most loyal ally. From an early age, Laria forged her path to the bridge through faultless service."

traits.locale_text: « Laria. {n}Le regard de Seberian se fait plus doux.{/n} Ma sénéchale. Ma fille. Des années durant, j'ai ignoré son existence. Elle aurait pu rester une simple erreur, née d'une rencontre fortuite avec une domestique anonyme, mais non, elle est devenue mon alliée la plus fidèle. Dès son plus jeune âge, Laria a forgé sa propre voie sur la passerelle, travaillant sans relâche et de façon irréprochable. »

languages.text: «Laria». {n}La mirada de Seberian se vuelve amable.{/n} «Mi Senescal. Mi hija. Durante años, no supe que existía. Podría haber sido un simple error, el fruto de un lance con una sirvienta de cuyo nombre no me acordaba, pero acabó siendo mi más fiel aliada. Desde una edad temprana, Laria se abrió camino hasta el puente mediante un servicio impecable».
languages.original_text: "Laria." {n}Seberian's gaze softens.{/n} "My Seneschal. My daughter. For years, I did not know of her existence. She could have been merely the mistake of a chance dalliance with a nameless servant, but instead she became my most loyal ally. From an early age, Laria forged her path to the bridge through faultless service."

traits.locale_text: «Laria». {n}La mirada de Seberian se vuelve amable.{/n} «Mi Senescal. Mi hija. Durante años, no supe que existía. Podría haber sido un simple error, el fruto de un lance con una sirvienta de cuyo nombre no me acordaba, pero acabó siendo mi más fiel aliada. Desde una edad temprana, Laria se abrió camino hasta el puente mediante un servicio impecable».

languages.text: "Laria." {n}Seberian'ın bakışları yumuşuyor.{/n} "Seneşalim. Kızım. Yıllarca varlığından haberdar değildim. İsimsiz bir hizmetçiyle tesadüfi bir ilişkinin hatalı sonucu olarak kalabilecekken benim en sadık müttefikim oldu. Laria, erken yaştan itibaren kusursuz hizmetiyle köprüye kadar yükselmeyi başardı."
languages.original_text: "Laria." {n}Seberian's gaze softens.{/n} "My Seneschal. My daughter. For years, I did not know of her existence. She could have been merely the mistake of a chance dalliance with a nameless servant, but instead she became my most loyal ally. From an early age, Laria forged her path to the bridge through faultless service."

traits.locale_text: "Laria." {n}Seberian'ın bakışları yumuşuyor.{/n} "Seneşalim. Kızım. Yıllarca varlığından haberdar değildim. İsimsiz bir hizmetçiyle tesadüfi bir ilişkinin hatalı sonucu olarak kalabilecekken benim en sadık müttefikim oldu. Laria, erken yaştan itibaren kusursuz hizmetiyle köprüye kadar yükselmeyi başardı."

languages.text: “菈丽雅。”{n}塞贝里安的目光柔和下来。{/n}“我的总领，我的女儿。很多年里，我都不知道她的存在。她本来只会是我与某个无名女仆一时风流犯下的过错，可她却成了我最忠诚的盟友。自幼年起，菈丽雅便靠无可挑剔的服役表现，一步步登上了舰桥。”
languages.original_text: "Laria." {n}Seberian's gaze softens.{/n} "My Seneschal. My daughter. For years, I did not know of her existence. She could have been merely the mistake of a chance dalliance with a nameless servant, but instead she became my most loyal ally. From an early age, Laria forged her path to the bridge through faultless service."

languages.text: 「ラリア。」{n}シベリアンの視線が和らぐ.{/n} 「私の執事。私の娘。何年も彼女の存在を知らなかった。彼女はただの無名侍従との偶然の逢瀬の誤りだったかもしれないが、代わりに彼女は私の最も忠実な同盟者になった。幼い頃からラリアは、完璧な奉仕によって橋へと道を切り開いた。」
languages.original_text: "Laria." {n}Seberian's gaze softens.{/n} "My Seneschal. My daughter. For years, I did not know of her existence. She could have been merely the mistake of a chance dalliance with a nameless servant, but instead she became my most loyal ally. From an early age, Laria forged her path to the bridge through faultless service."
